questions.question: Describe the primary purpose of a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) in image classification tasks. (4 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the key application of CNNs

questions.question: What is the effect of increasing the number of filters in a convolutional layer on the model's capacity to learn complex features? (6 marks)
questions.hint: Consider both positive and negative effects

questions.question: A CNN architecture consists of three convolutional layers followed by four fully connected layers. What type of layer is most likely to be used after the last convolutional layer? (3 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the typical sequence of layers in a CNN
